comments: Approved. Verified against tasks/v0.7-m1-result-review-packet.json, tasks/v0.7-m1-execution-contract.json, and `git show --stat --name-only 06ca832`. The commit contains exactly four files: the two allowed implementation markdown files (tasks/v0.7-m1-protocol-reframing.md and tasks/v0.7-m1-scenario-modeling.md) plus the two allowed execution artifacts (tasks/v0.7-m1-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.7-m1-result-review-packet.json). The execution result artifact matches the git-visible implementation/artifact changes exactly, closure_state_changes is empty, there are no src/ changes, no workflow state mutations, and no modifications to existing docs or protocol files. The markdown content adequately defines the core protocol boundary, the required roles (Executor, Reviewer/Gatekeeper, Coordinator, optional Evaluator), and the Personal/Team Mode scenarios within the contract scope.
